{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame Truegolds
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Forty-eight of the strongest [[Blackflame Truegolds]] were gathered on the deck of the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
